title: Agent Bundle
description: A stable, self-describing export of a single archived item, designed for consumption by AI agents (Claude, Hermes, Codex, etc.).

bundle_version.description: Version of the agent bundle spec this file conforms to.

item_id.description: Unique identifier for the archived item (e.g. tweet_id).

source_platform.description: Platform the item was captured from.

captured_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the item was captured (datetime_utc from tweet.json).

text_excerpt.description: Full or truncated text of the item. Truncated excerpts end with '...'.

text_full.description: Full untruncated text. Omitted if same as text_excerpt.

media.description: List of media assets attached to the item.

file.description: Original filename as stored in tweet.json media[].file.

path.description: Relative path to the media file within the bundle output directory.

alt_text.description: Alt text or description of the media, if available.

sha256.description: SHA-256 hash of the media file, if computed.

ocr_text.description: Full OCR text extracted from media, if available.

article_md_path.description: Relative path to the article markdown file within the bundle, if available.

assets.description: List of all files included in the bundle output directory.

path.description: Relative path within the bundle directory.

size_bytes.description: File size in bytes, if available.

citation_label.description: Suggested citation label for the item (e.g. '@example_user, 2026-07-08').

trust_flags.description: Flags indicating data quality and completeness.

validated.description: Whether the source tweet.json passed schema validation.

has_media.description: Whether the item has media attachments.

has_article.description: Whether an article markdown is available.

media_verified.description: Whether all declared media files exist on disk.

provenance.description: Provenance metadata about the capture and export process.

exported_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the bundle was exported.

export_tool.description: Name and version of the tool that produced the bundle.

source_dir.description: Original directory path the bundle was exported from.

schema_version.description: Version of the tweet.json schema the source conforms to.

related_items.description: List of related item IDs (e.g. reply threads, quote tweets).
